title: Cubica Project-Local Plugin Manifest
description: Contract for trusted project-local plugins. The first supported target is player-web; marketplace and runtime-api targets are intentionally reserved for later architecture decisions.

id.description: Stable plugin identifier inside one game project.

gameId.description: Game project that owns this plugin.

apiVersion.description: Plugin contract version implemented by the plugin.

targets.description: Platform targets this plugin contributes to.

entry.description: Project-relative TypeScript entrypoint inside the plugin root.

contributes.description: Contribution points exposed by the plugin.

gameConfigFactory.description: Registers a player-web game configuration factory.

phaserSceneFactory.description: Registers a Phaser scene factory for interactiveBoardSurface components.

accessibleBoardActionsProvider.description: Registers an engine-independent projection of server-authorized board actions for ordinary DOM controls.

validation.description: Named package scripts allowed to run during plugin validation. The validator maps these names to direct process execution without shell strings.

permissions.description: Explicit permission request. First implementation allows only the locked-down local shape below.

dependenciesPolicy.description: Plugins may use only platform-provided packages until marketplace verification exists.

validationCommandName.description: Name of an allowed package script, not a shell command.
